It's official: grey UK's favourite colour.
According figures released Society Motor Manufacturers Traders (SMMT), 495,127 grey cars were registered 2018, giving whopping 20.9 cent market share, increase cent compared year before.
It's first time grey topped charts since records began.
While we're rather fond some grey colour options like Audi's Nardo grey many battleship-like imitators, figures make country's buyers look rather conservative.
cent 2018's cars were either grey, black white, while demand yellow dropped cent.

Weirdly, another 'winner' beige, with cent jump giving first appearance since 2014.
very least, blue still strong sellers they're highest-placed primary colours fourth fifth respectively, with market share 26.1 cent between them.
